ふぅ……よし、これで全部ね！: Phew... All right, that's all of them!
よくやったな。<br>よし、そこの１台を路地裏まで運んでくれ！:
Nice work.
Now, drag one of them into the alley!
<user>は、ナイフの先を使い、<br>器用に警備ロボットの装甲のネジを外して:
Using the tip of a knife, %user% deftly removes the screws from the
security robot's armor plating.
ああ。こいつの部品を取り出して持って帰ろうと思ってな。<br>アーデルハイトに渡:
I'm pulling parts out of this thing to take back.
They should be useful for Adelheid's weapon development.
細い管みたいなものとか、小さな板みたいなものとか……<br>これを組み合わせるだ:
Thin tubes and small boards...
It can move just by combining these things?
多分、コードとか、マザーボードとか、だと思う……<br>ロボットだから、機械関係:
I think those are cables and motherboards...
Since it's a robot, it's just packed with mechanical components...
随分詳しいな。そっちの知識もあるのか？: You seem to know a lot. You have knowledge about this stuff?
ううん。パパが趣味でおもちゃのロボットを作ってたのを、<br>子どもの頃、そばで:
Not really. Papa used to build toy robots as a hobby,
and I just watched him from up close when I was little.
ヒマリのパパも、天才科学者だったの～？: Was Himari's Papa a genius scientist too~?
ううん。ただのサラリーマンだよ。<br>パパのロボットは、おもちゃだから歩くくら:
No. He was just an office worker.
Papa's robots were toys— they could only walk around.
さっきのロジーとか言う眼鏡っ子が連れてたのも似たような構造なのかな？<br>随分:
I wonder if the glasses girl's robot
is built the same way? It sure talked a lot though.
う～ん……どうなんだろう？ 人工知能でも積んでるのかな？<br>だとしたら凄い科:
Hmm... I wonder? Maybe it has artificial intelligence?
If so, that would be some incredible technology.
自称天才科学者か……技術力だけは、<br>アーデルハイト並みなのかもしれないな。:
A self-proclaimed genius scientist... Her technical skills alone
might be on par with Adelheid's.
あいつ何者なんだろうね～？ 教授とか言ってたし、<br>ルクスノヴァの人たちみた:
I wonder who she really is~? She called herself a professor,
but she didn't have those thin wings like the Lux Nova people.
ってことは、トレスリア地方の人ってことですかね～？: So does that mean she's from the Treslia region~?
トレスリア地方にも研究者は沢山いるもの。<br>あんな技術を持った人には初めて出:
There are plenty of researchers in the Treslia region.
Though I've never met anyone with technology like that...
ロジーたちは大穴の異物収集が目的で探索をしているようだったな。<br>あのゴレイ:
Logy's group seems to be collecting artifacts.
That Goleinu might use otherworldly tech too.
アーデルハイトさん並みの技術……やっかいですねぇ～。: Technology rivaling Adelheid's... That's quite troublesome~.
各部品にいろんな文字や紋章が刻まれてるな。<br>ヒマリ、読めるか？:
There are all kinds of letters and symbols engraved on these parts.
Himari, can you read them?
百菱重工業、月立製作所、SQOONY……え？<br>こ、こんな名前の会社、日本に:
Hyakubishi Heavy Industries, Tsukitachi Manufacturing, SQOONY...
Huh? W-were there companies with these names in Japan...?
ど、どこも機械のメーカーなんだけど、<br>ヒマリが知ってる企業名と微妙に違って:
Th-they're all machinery manufacturers,
but the names are slightly different from the ones Himari knows...
なるほど。さっきの何とかタワーも、無くなってるって言ってたよな？<br>なんなん:
I see. You also said that tower from before was gone, right?
What's with these subtle differences from your memories...?
え～と、つまり、こっちの世界では、アーデルハイトさん並みの技術を持った<br>組:
So~, in other words, this world has lots of organizations
with technology on par with Adelheid's~?
そういうことだ。<br>しかも、俺たちを”侵入者”とみなして攻撃を仕掛けてきやが:
That's the gist of it.
And on top of that, they mark us as 'intruders' and attack on sight.
硬くて、強くてやっかいだもんね～。: They're hard, strong, and a real pain~.
剣や魔法では苦戦するのは必至ね。<br>ねぇ、ヒマリ、こっちの世界特有の武器って:
We'll definitely struggle with swords and magic alone.
Hey Himari, doesn't this world have its own unique weapons?
日本で武器なんて、どこにも売ってないよ～。<br>そんなの持ってたら警察に捕まっ:
You can't buy weapons anywhere in Japan~.
You'd get arrested by the police if you had any.
うん。もしかしたら、武器が見つかるかもしれない。<br>確か、この近くに……:
Yeah. We might be able to find weapons.
If I remember right, near here there should be...
ウソ……警察署が……壊れちゃってる……: No way... The police station... is destroyed...
あ～～～ここもぺっしゃんこだね～。: Ohh~~~ this place is totally flattened too~.
ここは他の建築物の壊れ方とは違うな。<br>徹底的に破壊されてるように見える……:
This one was destroyed differently from the other buildings.

爆薬で破壊されたんですかね～？: Do you think it was destroyed with explosives~?
ここにも、ジドーシャとか言うの転がってるね～。: There are more of those car things lying around here too~.
なんだかドアのところに大きな文字が書かれてるわ。<br>ヒマリ、読める？:
There's something written in big letters by the door.
Himari, can you read it?
うん。都内を走ってるパトカーなら『警視庁』って文字が入ってるはず。<br>なのに:
Yeah. Patrol cars in the city should say 'Metropolitan Police.'

ヒマリ～！ こっちの建物が崩れてるトコに、<br>看板みたいなの落ちてる～！:
Himari~! Over where this building collapsed,
there's a sign that fell down~!
ヒマリ。こっちにも何か書いてあるみたいね。<br>読んでくれる？:
Himari. There seems to be something written over here too.
Can you read it?
『東京機動憲兵隊、愛宕秩序管理局』……？: 'Tokyo Mobile Military Police, Atago Order Management Bureau'...?
ヒマリ？ どうしたの？ 何かおかしなことあったー？: Himari? What's wrong? Is something weird~?
憲兵隊……怖いロボットだらけの廃墟になった街……<br>消えた東京タワーに、変な:
Military police... A city in ruins full of scary robots...
A missing Tokyo Tower, companies with strange names...
わたしの知ってる街とは、似てるようで全然違う……: It looks similar to the city I knew, but it's completely different...
……もしかして、これって……えっと、こういう世界のこと<br>なんて言うんだっけ:
...Could this be... um, what do you call a world like this...
what was the word...?
わっわっわっ！ じ、地震だよぉ～～～！: Wah wah wah! I-it's an earthquake~~~!
っ！？ 建物から離れろ！ 崩壊するぞ！: ...!? Get away from the buildings! They'll collapse!
